description: Reply target list for twitter-reply-gal skill. Each handle has a topic-of-interest annotation that helps Sasha pick angles. Refresh weekly.

targets.sasha_angle: Concrete onboarding friction examples from a wallet's perspective. No empty agreement.
Specific data point or contrast, not a compliment.
Connect macro to onchain receipts where possible.
Stay narrow — onchain or DeFi UX. Skip macro takes.
Specific UX failure or success Sasha has observed.

rotation_notes: Phase 1 ships with these 5 to match the existing hardcoded list. Local content-writer expands this weekly with rotation-by-engagement: drop handles whose tweets Sasha hasn't been able to reply to in 7 days; add handles surfacing in `apify-mcp` or `linkedin-monitor`-equivalent Twitter scrapes.
